title: Sony releases trailer for Taika Waititi's Klara and the Sun
gist: Sony Pictures released the first trailer for Taika Waititi's adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro's Klara and the Sun, starring Jenna Ortega, with a theatrical release set for October 23, 2026. The film, themed around an AI 'Artificial Friend,' marks Waititi's most dramatic tonal turn.

insights.claim: Sony Pictures released the first trailer for Klara and the Sun, an adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro's novel written and directed by Taika Waititi, with a theatrical release date of October 23, 2026.
insights.speaker: Jennifer Ouellette
insights.so_what: A dated Q4 2026 theatrical release marks a near-term content slot for Sony's film pipeline.
insights.locator: Klara and the Sun hits theaters on October 23, 2026

insights.claim: The film stars Jenna Ortega as Klara alongside Amy Adams, Natasha Lyonne, and Steve Buscemi, adapting a Nobel laureate's bestselling novel about an AI Artificial Friend.
insights.speaker: Jennifer Ouellette
insights.so_what: Recognizable cast plus an AI/human-relationship theme positions the title for both prestige and topical-AI marketing.
insights.locator: Based on the bestselling novel from Nobel Prize winner
